scripts.build:native: napi build --platform --release --cargo-cwd ./src-rs --js index.cjs && npm run build:bindings
scripts.build:native:dev: napi build --platform --cargo-cwd ./src-rs --js index.cjs && npm run build:bindings
scripts.build:bindings: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const p = 'build/native'; if (!fs.existsSync(p)) fs.mkdirSync(p, {recursive:true}); const f = fs.readdirSync('.').find(x => x.endsWith('.node')); if (f) { fs.renameSync(f, p + '/' + f); ['index.d.ts', 'index.cjs'].forEach(x => { if(fs.existsSync(x)) fs.renameSync(x, p + '/' + x) }); console.log('Moved ' + f + ' to ' + p); } else { console.log('Current dir: ' + process.cwd()); console.error('No .node file found here'); process.exit(1); }"
